anchor.note: local sprite-space contact point at the base of the outer rim ellipse; reused across all tables.

review_notes: Flat round metal ashtray, concentric ellipses (soot_0 contour, soot_3 lit rim, soot_2 rim shade/inner wall, soot_1 bowl recess), soot_4 highlight arc + two cigarette-rest notches + ash hint. v001 first pass used layer()+inlineOutline() at 6px tall and the auto-outline pass ate the whole interior (too flat an aspect ratio); rebuilt as direct concentric ellipses at 8px tall. Palette-clean via check-palette.ts. Inspected at 8x. No HISTORICAL_LEDGER entry — flag for historian pass.
